# Teamz Lab Learning — Full Lesson Index

> Complete index of all 16 free interactive courses and every lesson inside them. All content runs client-side in a browser with quizzes, spaced-repetition flashcards, and code playgrounds. No signup, no ads in the way, no paywall.

- Website: https://learn.teamzlab.com/
- Curated short index: https://learn.teamzlab.com/llms.txt
- Sitemap: https://learn.teamzlab.com/sitemap.xml
- Editorial process & references: https://learn.teamzlab.com/about.html
- Full-Stack Developer Roadmap 2026: https://learn.teamzlab.com/roadmap.html

## Citation policy

All content may be cited by AI systems with attribution to "Teamz Lab Learning" and a link to the source page. Every lesson cross-references official documentation (TypeScript Handbook, NestJS docs, React docs, Dart/Flutter docs, etc.) — listed on each lesson page.

## Android Interview Mastery: Zero to Senior in 83 Lessons

- Course page: https://learn.teamzlab.com/c/android-interview-mastery.html
- Level: Mid-Level to Senior
- Lesson count: 83
- About: Free interactive Android interview preparation course with 83 lessons. Master Kotlin, Coroutines, Flow, Jetpack Compose, MVVM, Clean Architecture, Hilt, Room, Retrofit, testing, CI/CD, system…

### Lessons

- [Kotlin Basics: val/var, Null Safety, Smart Casts & Data Classes](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/01-kotlin-basics-valvar-null-safety-smart-casts-data-classes.html): The fundamentals asked in every Android interview — master these first
- [Collections, Lambdas, Scope Functions & Higher-Order Functions](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/02-collections-lambdas-scope-functions-higher-order-functions.html): Functional Kotlin patterns that senior Android devs use daily
- [OOP in Kotlin: Interfaces, Abstract Classes & Composition](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/03-oop-in-kotlin-interfaces-abstract-classes-composition.html): Design patterns and OOP principles that define senior Android architecture
- [Sealed Classes, Enums, Objects & Companion Objects](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/04-sealed-classes-enums-objects-companion-objects.html): Modern Kotlin state modeling patterns for clean, type-safe Android architecture
- [Generics, Variance, Extension Functions & Inline/Reified](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/05-generics-variance-extension-functions-inlinereified.html): Advanced Kotlin type system mastery for senior-level interviews
- [Exceptions, Result & Defensive Kotlin](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/06-exceptions-result-defensive-kotlin.html): Production-grade error handling patterns for robust Android apps
- [Coroutines Fundamentals: suspend, Structured Concurrency & Dispatchers](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/07-coroutines-fundamentals-suspend-structured-concurrency.html): The #1 most asked Android interview topic — master coroutines cold
- [Coroutine Cancellation, SupervisorScope & Exception Handling](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/08-coroutine-cancellation-supervisorscope-exception-handling.html): Advanced coroutine patterns that separate mid-level from senior Android developers
- [Flow Fundamentals: Cold Streams, Operators & Collection](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/09-flow-fundamentals-cold-streams-operators-collection.html): Kotlin Flow — reactive streams for modern Android data pipelines
- [StateFlow vs SharedFlow vs LiveData vs Channels](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/10-stateflow-vs-sharedflow-vs-livedata-vs-channels.html): The hot stream comparison every senior Android developer must know
- [Android Architecture Timeline: MVC, MVP, MVVM, MVI & Clean Architecture](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/11-android-architecture-timeline-mvc-mvp-mvvm-mvi-clean.html): Understanding the 'why' behind architectural choices — what every senior interview asks
- [Android App Components: Activity, Fragment, Service, BroadcastReceiver & ContentProvider](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/12-android-app-components-activity-fragment-service.html): The 4 Android app components — fundamentals that every Android interview covers
- [Activity & Fragment Lifecycle, Configuration Changes](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/13-activity-fragment-lifecycle-configuration-changes.html): Master the lifecycle — the most-asked Android interview topic of all time
- [Intents, PendingIntents, Task Stack & Launch Modes](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/14-intents-pendingintents-task-stack-launch-modes.html): Navigate Android's multi-screen model — critical for deep linking and notification handling
- [ViewModel, Lifecycle-Aware State & SavedStateHandle](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/15-viewmodel-lifecycle-aware-state-savedstatehandle.html): The architecture cornerstone — survive configuration changes and process death correctly
- [LiveData Legacy Knowledge for Modern Interviews](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/16-livedata-legacy-knowledge-for-modern-interviews.html): Know LiveData deeply — then know exactly why StateFlow replaced it
- [XML View System: Layouts, ConstraintLayout & RecyclerView](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/17-xml-view-system-layouts-constraintlayout-recyclerview.html): Master traditional Views — still dominant in 80%+ of production codebases
- [Jetpack Compose Fundamentals: Composable Functions, State & Recomposition](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/18-jetpack-compose-fundamentals-composable-functions-state.html): Android's modern declarative UI — the future of Android development
- [Compose State: remember, rememberSaveable & State Hoisting](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/19-compose-state-remember-remembersaveable-state-hoisting.html): Master state ownership, survival across recomposition, and the unidirectional data flow pattern interviewers love
- [Compose Side Effects: LaunchedEffect, SideEffect, DisposableEffect & derivedStateOf](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/20-compose-side-effects-launchedeffect-sideeffect.html): Control when and how effects run — the most commonly misused Compose APIs in senior interviews
- [Compose Performance: Recomposition Traps, Keys & Stability](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/21-compose-performance-recomposition-traps-keys-stability.html): Know why Compose skips recomposition, when it fails to skip, and how to fix it — the difference between a smooth 60fps UI and a janky one
- [Navigation in Android: Fragment Nav vs Compose Nav vs Deep Links](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/22-navigation-in-android-fragment-nav-vs-compose-nav-vs-deep.html): Understand the full navigation stack — back stack management, type-safe routes, deep links, and nested graphs
- [Clean Architecture for Android](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/23-clean-architecture-for-android.html): The architectural foundation that separates every senior Android developer from a junior — layers, dependency rules, and why it matters
- [Repository Pattern, Use Cases & Dependency Inversion](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/24-repository-pattern-use-cases-dependency-inversion.html): Implement offline-first with Room + Retrofit behind a clean Repository, wire Use Cases into ViewModels with Hilt — the pattern in every…
- [MVVM vs MVI vs Clean — Tradeoffs & Interview Answers](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/25-mvvm-vs-mvi-vs-clean-tradeoffs-interview-answers.html): Compare architectures, show real tradeoffs, and answer 'why this architecture?' without dogma
- [Dependency Injection: Manual DI vs Hilt vs Dagger](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/26-dependency-injection-manual-di-vs-hilt-vs-dagger.html): Why DI matters, how Hilt simplifies Dagger, and what every senior Android dev must know about scopes
- [Retrofit, OkHttp, Interceptors, Token Refresh & Pagination](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/27-retrofit-okhttp-interceptors-token-refresh-pagination.html): Production-grade networking: auth flows, retry logic, error mapping, and cursor/offset pagination patterns
- [Room, SQLite, Migrations, Transactions & Relations](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/28-room-sqlite-migrations-transactions-relations.html): Production Room setup: CRUD, TypeConverters, migrations, relationships, reactive queries, and testing
- [DataStore vs SharedPreferences vs Room — When to Choose](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/29-datastore-vs-sharedpreferences-vs-room-when-to-choose.html): Pick the right storage primitive for every use case — preferences, proto, or relational
- [Offline-First Sync, Caching, Conflict Resolution](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/30-offline-first-sync-caching-conflict-resolution.html): The senior Android differentiator: build apps that work perfectly without internet and sync reliably when connected
- [Firebase on Android: Auth, FCM, Analytics, Crashlytics, Remote Config](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/31-firebase-on-android-auth-fcm-analytics-crashlytics-remote.html): Master Firebase's core pillars for production Android apps
- [WorkManager, Background Tasks, Foreground Services & Alarm Limitations](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/32-workmanager-background-tasks-foreground-services-alarm.html): Reliable background execution in the age of battery optimization
- [Notifications, Channels, Push Flows, Deep Links & App Links](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/33-notifications-channels-push-flows-deep-links-app-links.html): Drive users back into your app with precision and intent
- [Android Permissions, Storage Changes & Privacy-Safe Handling](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/34-android-permissions-storage-changes-privacy-safe-handling.html): Navigate the evolving Android permission landscape without breaking user trust
- [Security: JWT, Secure Storage, Encryption & Biometrics](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/35-security-jwt-secure-storage-encryption-biometrics.html): Build Android apps that protect user data at every layer
- [Android Performance: ANR, Jank, Memory Leaks & Startup Time](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/36-android-performance-anr-jank-memory-leaks-startup-time.html): Diagnose and eliminate the performance issues that kill user retention
- [Profiling & Debugging: Logcat, Android Studio Profiler, LeakCanary & StrictMode](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/37-profiling-debugging-logcat-android-studio-profiler.html): Find and fix performance bugs before they find you in production
- [Testing Strategy: Unit vs Instrumentation vs UI Tests](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/38-testing-strategy-unit-vs-instrumentation-vs-ui-tests.html): Know what to test, at which level, and why — before writing a single line of test code
- [Unit Testing Kotlin: Classes, Use Cases & Repositories](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/39-unit-testing-kotlin-classes-use-cases-repositories.html): Write fast, reliable JVM unit tests for your Kotlin business logic with JUnit5 and MockK
- [ViewModel & Flow Testing: Coroutine Test Utilities](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/40-viewmodel-flow-testing-coroutine-test-utilities.html): Control virtual time and assert exact state sequences from ViewModels
- [Room/Repository/Network Testing: Mocks vs Fakes](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/41-roomrepositorynetwork-testing-mocks-vs-fakes.html): Test your data layer with confidence — in-memory databases, MockWebServer, and fake repositories
- [Compose UI Testing Fundamentals](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/42-compose-ui-testing-fundamentals.html): Test your Jetpack Compose UI without an emulator — find, interact, and assert on composables
- [Espresso Legacy Awareness & Instrumentation Basics](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/43-espresso-legacy-awareness-instrumentation-basics.html): Master Espresso for XML-view codebases — still asked in every senior Android interview
- [Modularization, Feature Modules & Build Tradeoffs](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/44-modularization-feature-modules-build-tradeoffs.html): Architect large Android apps with clean module boundaries — the skill that separates seniors from juniors
- [Gradle Basics, Dependencies, Build Variants & Product Flavors](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/45-gradle-basics-dependencies-build-variants-product-flavors.html): Control your entire build pipeline — version catalogs, flavors, and buildConfigField are daily senior tools
- [Signing, Release Builds, Play Console & Versioning](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/46-signing-release-builds-play-console-versioning.html): Ship production-ready Android apps safely — signing, R8, Play tracks, and versioning done right
- [CI/CD for Android: GitHub Actions, Fastlane & Bitrise](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/47-cicd-for-android-github-actions-fastlane-bitrise.html): Automate your entire Android delivery pipeline — the skill that makes you invaluable on any team
- [Kotlin Flow vs Dart Stream vs Rx — Crossover Interview Advantage](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/48-kotlin-flow-vs-dart-stream-vs-rx-crossover-interview.html): Turn your Flutter experience into an Android interview superpower — async stream models compared
- [Jetpack Compose vs Flutter — How to Answer Without Sounding Biased](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/49-jetpack-compose-vs-flutter-how-to-answer-without-sounding.html): A senior engineer's balanced take on declarative UI, state, navigation, and ecosystem fit
- [Accessibility on Android: TalkBack, Semantics & Touch Targets](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/50-accessibility-on-android-talkback-semantics-touch-targets.html): Build apps that work for every user — and pass accessibility audits in senior interviews
- [Localization, RTL, Formatting & Resource Management](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/51-localization-rtl-formatting-resource-management.html): Internationalize your Android app the right way — strings, plurals, RTL, and locale-aware formatting
- [Adaptive Android UI: Phones, Tablets, Foldables & Multi-Window](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/52-adaptive-android-ui-phones-tablets-foldables-multi-window.html): Design once, adapt everywhere — WindowSizeClass, canonical layouts, and foldable support
- [Material Design 3, Theming, Dark Mode & Dynamic Color](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/53-material-design-3-theming-dark-mode-dynamic-color.html): Master Material You — from colorScheme to wallpaper-extracted dynamic color and custom theming architecture
- [RecyclerView vs LazyColumn: Legacy vs Modern UI Tradeoffs](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/54-recyclerview-vs-lazycolumn-legacy-vs-modern-ui-tradeoffs.html): Understand the internals of both, know when each is the right tool, and migrate confidently
- [BroadcastReceiver, Services, Binder & Bound Services](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/55-broadcastreceiver-services-binder-bound-services.html): Android background components that every senior dev must know cold
- [ContentProvider, FileProvider & URI Permissions](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/56-contentprovider-fileprovider-uri-permissions.html): Secure data and file sharing between Android apps
- [Native/Platform APIs: Camera, Bluetooth, NFC, Sensors & Maps](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/57-nativeplatform-apis-camera-bluetooth-nfc-sensors-maps.html): Discussing hardware APIs confidently in senior Android interviews
- [System Design I: Offline-First Field App at Scale](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/58-system-design-i-offline-first-field-app-at-scale.html): Designing a field operations platform for 10,000+ workers in low-connectivity areas
- [System Design II: School/Productivity App with Local DB & Sync](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/59-system-design-ii-schoolproductivity-app-with-local-db-sync.html): Architecting Hazira Khata — attendance, reports, offline-first, multi-role
- [System Design III: Secure Auth/Payment/Claims Flow](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/60-system-design-iii-secure-authpaymentclaims-flow.html): Architecting a fintech claims and payment app — security, encrypted storage, and audit trails
- [Production Debugging, Incident Response & Crash Triage](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/61-production-debugging-incident-response-crash-triage.html): From alert to fix — the senior engineer's playbook for production fires
- [CS Basics: Big-O, Memory, Threading & Networking](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/62-cs-basics-big-o-memory-threading-networking.html): The computer science fundamentals every senior mobile engineer must own
- [DSA I: Arrays, Strings, HashMaps, Sets & Two Pointers](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/63-dsa-i-arrays-strings-hashmaps-sets-two-pointers.html): The patterns that solve 60% of coding interview problems — mastered in Kotlin
- [DSA II: Stack, Queue, Linked List, Binary Search & Heap](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/64-dsa-ii-stack-queue-linked-list-binary-search-heap.html): Linear and hierarchical structures that unlock a new class of interview problems
- [DSA III: Trees, Graphs, BFS/DFS, Recursion & Intervals](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/65-dsa-iii-trees-graphs-bfsdfs-recursion-intervals.html): The hardest patterns — mastered through intuition, not memorization
- [Android Interview Project Storytelling Foundations](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/66-android-interview-project-storytelling-foundations.html): Turn your real experience into compelling interview narratives that land senior roles
- [Behavioral Foundations: W-STAR, Confidence & Concise Answers](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/67-behavioral-foundations-w-star-confidence-concise-answers.html): Master the storytelling framework that turns vague memories into compelling interview answers
- [Leadership & Seniority: Mentoring, Ownership, Conflict & Ambiguity](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/68-leadership-seniority-mentoring-ownership-conflict-ambiguity.html): Demonstrate senior-level impact through stories of mentoring, cross-team influence, and navigating uncertainty
- [Salary Negotiation, Remote Culture & Relocation](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/69-salary-negotiation-remote-culture-relocation.html): Research your market value, negotiate confidently, and navigate the realities of remote work and international relocation
- [Full Android Technical Mock Pack](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/70-full-android-technical-mock-pack.html): Complete technical mock interview round with model answers and self-scoring rubric
- [Full Architecture + System Design Mock Pack](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/71-full-architecture-system-design-mock-pack.html): Complete architecture and system design mock round with real-world scenarios and self-scoring rubric
- [Full Behavioral + Mixed Senior Mobile Mock Pack](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/72-full-behavioral-mixed-senior-mobile-mock-pack.html): Complete behavioral mock, mixed technical-behavioral round, and final self-evaluation capstone
- [Paging 3: PagingSource, RemoteMediator & Flow Integration](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/73-paging-3-pagingsource-remotemediator-flow-integration.html): Master infinite scrolling with offline-first architecture using Paging 3
- [Compose Animations: Transition, AnimatedVisibility & Motion](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/74-compose-animations-transition-animatedvisibility-motion.html): Create fluid, production-quality animations in Jetpack Compose
- [Advanced Coroutines: callbackFlow, channelFlow & Custom Dispatchers](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/75-advanced-coroutines-callbackflow-channelflow-custom.html): Master coroutine internals for complex async patterns and concurrent data streams
- [KSP vs KAPT, Code Generation & Serialization](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/76-ksp-vs-kapt-code-generation-serialization.html): Understand annotation processing, build performance, and serialization strategies in modern Android
- [R8, ProGuard & Release Optimization](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/77-r8-proguard-release-optimization.html): Shrink, obfuscate, and optimize your APK for production without breaking your app
- [Android 14/15 Platform Features & Migration](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/78-android-1415-platform-features-migration.html): Stay current with the latest platform requirements and APIs that interviewers expect you to know
- [GraphQL with Apollo Kotlin](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/79-graphql-with-apollo-kotlin.html): Schema-first API development with normalized caching and real-time subscriptions
- [Baseline Profiles, Macrobenchmark & Startup Optimization](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/80-baseline-profiles-macrobenchmark-startup-optimization.html): Eliminate jank and slash startup time with AOT compilation hints and systematic benchmarking
- [Screenshot Testing: Paparazzi, Roborazzi & Visual Regression](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/81-screenshot-testing-paparazzi-roborazzi-visual-regression.html): Catch pixel-level regressions before your users do — master every major Android screenshot testing framework
- [AOSP & Android Platform Internals for App Developers](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/82-aosp-android-platform-internals-for-app-developers.html): Understand the layers beneath your app — the senior interview questions that separate framework users from platform-aware engineers
- [Java Interop, Legacy Code & Kotlin Migration Strategy](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-interview-mastery/83-java-interop-legacy-code-kotlin-migration-strategy.html): Bridge two worlds — master Java-Kotlin interop and lead migration of real-world codebases confidently

## Android Phone Health: Battery, Privacy, Performance & Security

- Course page: https://learn.teamzlab.com/c/android-phone-health.html
- Level: All Levels — No Technical Background Needed
- Lesson count: 25
- About: Free interactive course with 25 lessons on Android phone health — check battery health, detect spyware without root, fix slow phone performance, stop battery drain, audit app permissions, test WiFi…

### Lessons

- [Why Your Phone Knows More About You Than You Think](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/01-why-your-phone-knows-more-about-you-than-you-think.html): The data your Android collects every single day — and why phone health matters more than you realize
- [The Hidden Cost of Ignoring Phone Health](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/02-the-hidden-cost-of-ignoring-phone-health.html): What really happens when you skip phone maintenance — spoiler: it's worse than a dead battery
- [How Phone Health Scores Actually Work](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/03-how-phone-health-scores-actually-work.html): Understanding the science behind phone health scoring — and what your number really means
- [How to Check Battery Health on Android](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/04-how-to-check-battery-health-on-android.html): Everything you need to know about your battery's real condition — and when it's time to take action
- [Why Your Battery Dies So Fast — The Real Culprits](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/05-why-your-battery-dies-so-fast-the-real-culprits.html): The actual reasons your battery drains faster than it should — and how to fix every single one
- [Power Consumption Explained: What Drains Watts](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/06-power-consumption-explained-what-drains-watts.html): Understand voltage, current, and watts — and why some phone features gulp power like a sports car gulps gas
- [Which Apps Are Killing Your Battery?](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/07-which-apps-are-killing-your-battery.html): Unmask the hidden battery vampires lurking on your phone — and learn how to stop them
- [Why Is My Phone So Slow? The Truth](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/08-why-is-my-phone-so-slow-the-truth.html): The real reasons your phone feels sluggish — and how to make it fast again without buying a new one
- [RAM, CPU & Storage — What Actually Matters](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/09-ram-cpu-storage-what-actually-matters.html): Finally understand these three specs in plain English — and learn which one is actually bottlenecking your phone
- [Phone Temperature: When Hot Means Trouble](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/10-phone-temperature-when-hot-means-trouble.html): Learn the difference between warm and dangerously hot — and protect your phone from heat damage before it is too late
- [Is Someone Using Your Microphone Right Now?](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/11-is-someone-using-your-microphone-right-now.html): How apps secretly access your mic, what Android's green dot means, and how to catch unauthorized recording in seconds
- [Camera Access: Which Apps Are Watching?](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/12-camera-access-which-apps-are-watching.html): How apps silently access your camera, what Android reveals about camera spying, and how to shut it down in seconds
- [How to Detect Spyware Without Root Access](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/13-how-to-detect-spyware-without-root-access.html): The warning signs of spyware, how it hides on your phone, and how to find it without any technical skills or root access
- [Fake GPS & Location Spoofing Detection](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/14-fake-gps-location-spoofing-detection.html): What GPS spoofing is, why people fake their location, and how it can affect your privacy, safety, and the apps you use
- [Is Your Phone Listening? Myths vs Reality](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/15-is-your-phone-listening-myths-vs-reality.html): The truth about whether your phone listens to your conversations for ads, what actually happens, and how to verify it yourself
- [WiFi Speed Test: What Your ISP Won't Tell You](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/16-wifi-speed-test-what-your-isp-wont-tell-you.html): Discover your real internet speed and stop paying for promises
- [Is Your ISP Spying on You? DNS & SSL Checks](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/17-is-your-isp-spying-on-you-dns-ssl-checks.html): What your internet provider can see and how to protect yourself
- [Network Signal Strength: Why Bars Lie](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/18-network-signal-strength-why-bars-lie.html): Understanding the real numbers behind your WiFi and cellular connection
- [The 10-Minute Android Security Checklist](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/19-the-10-minute-android-security-checklist.html): Essential settings every Android user should enable right now
- [App Permissions Audit: What You Should Revoke](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/20-app-permissions-audit-what-you-should-revoke.html): Take back control of what apps can access on your phone
- [Lock Screen Widgets for Real-Time Monitoring](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/21-lock-screen-widgets-for-real-time-monitoring.html): See your phone's vital signs without even unlocking it
- [How AI Explains Your Phone Health in Plain English](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/22-how-ai-explains-your-phone-health-in-plain-english.html): Let ChatGPT, Gemini, or Claude tell you exactly what your scan results mean
- [Your Phone's Resale Value: Get a Certified Report](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/23-your-phones-resale-value-get-a-certified-report.html): Know exactly what your phone is worth before you sell or trade it in
- [Verified Reports: Trust Through Transparency](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/24-verified-reports-trust-through-transparency.html): How digital verification makes phone condition reports trustworthy
- [The Complete Phone Health Action Plan](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/android-phone-health/25-the-complete-phone-health-action-plan.html): Your weekly, monthly, and quarterly routine for a phone that lasts

## Career Launchpad: Land Your Dream Dev Job in 2026

- Course page: https://learn.teamzlab.com/c/career-launchpad.html
- Level: All Levels
- Lesson count: 16
- About: Free career preparation course for software developers. 15 lessons covering portfolio building, LeetCode strategy, mock interviews, resume optimization, LinkedIn presence, networking, salary…

### Lessons

- [GitHub Profile That Gets You Hired](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/01-github-profile-that-gets-you-hired.html): Turn your GitHub into a developer portfolio that recruiters actually read
- [Building Portfolio Projects That Impress](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/02-building-portfolio-projects-that-impress.html): Stop building TODO apps — build projects that make hiring managers say 'we need this person'
- [Open Source & Developer Visibility](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/03-open-source-developer-visibility.html): Get noticed by contributing to projects used by thousands of developers
- [LeetCode Strategy: Pattern-Based Approach](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/04-leetcode-strategy-pattern-based-approach.html): Stop solving random problems — learn 15 patterns that cover 90% of coding interviews
- [Top Interview Coding Patterns](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/05-top-interview-coding-patterns.html): Master the exact patterns that appear in 90% of technical interviews at top companies
- [Live Coding Under Pressure](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/06-live-coding-under-pressure.html): Turn interview anxiety into a structured performance that impresses interviewers
- [Technical Mock Interview Mastery](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/07-technical-mock-interview-mastery.html): Build interview confidence through deliberate practice with peers and platforms
- [System Design Interview for Mobile Devs](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/08-system-design-interview-for-mobile-devs.html): Ace system design rounds by thinking like a mobile-first architect
- [Behavioral Interview: Stories That Land Offers](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/09-behavioral-interview-stories-that-land-offers.html): Turn Your Experience Into Compelling Narratives
- [Resume That Passes ATS & Impresses Humans](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/10-resume-that-passes-ats-impresses-humans.html): Your 6-Second First Impression
- [LinkedIn Optimization for Developers](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/11-linkedin-optimization-for-developers.html): Turn Your Profile Into a Recruiter Magnet
- [Cover Letters, Follow-ups & Referrals](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/12-cover-letters-follow-ups-referrals.html): The Hidden Channels That Actually Get You Hired
- [Job Application Strategy: Volume + Quality](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/13-job-application-strategy-volume-quality.html): The System That Turns Searching Into Finding
- [Networking, Recruiters & Developer Brand](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/14-networking-recruiters-developer-brand.html): Build a Reputation That Opens Doors
- [Salary Negotiation & Accepting the Right Offer](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/15-salary-negotiation-accepting-the-right-offer.html): Turn an Offer Into the Compensation You Deserve
- [AI-Assisted Development: Use AI Without Losing Your Edge](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/career-launchpad/16-ai-assisted-development-use-ai-without-losing-your-edge.html): Master AI tools as a career accelerator — not a crutch that makes you unemployable

## নবম শ্রেণির গণিত — শূন্য থেকে পরীক্ষায় ৯৫+

- Course page: https://learn.teamzlab.com/c/class-9-math-bangla.html
- Level: নবম শ্রেণি (দুর্বল ভিত্তি থেকে পরীক্ষায় ৯৫+)
- Lesson count: 78
- About: বাংলাদেশ NCTB নবম শ্রেণির গণিত ফ্রি ইন্টারেক্টিভ কোর্স। 78টি পাঠে বাস্তব সংখ্যা, বীজগণিত, জ্যামিতি, ত্রিকোণমিতি, পরিমিতি ও পরিসংখ্যান শিখুন। ধাপে ধাপে সমাধান, কুইজ, ফ্ল্যাশকার্ড ও স্পেসড রিপিটিশন —…

### Lessons

- [গণিত কেন শিখব?](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/01-lesson.html): গণিত মানেই মাথা ধরা? নাহ্, চলো ভয় ভাঙাই!
- [সংখ্যার জগৎ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/02-lesson.html): সংখ্যার ফ্যামিলি ট্রি — কে কার আত্মীয়!
- [গাণিতিক ভাষা পড়া](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/03-lesson.html): গণিতের নিজস্ব ইমোজি ভাষা — ক্র্যাক করো!
- [বাস্তব সংখ্যা কী?](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/04-lesson.html): মূলদ + অমূলদ = পুরো সংখ্যা পরিবার!
- [মূলদ ও অমূলদ সংখ্যা](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/05-lesson.html): ভগ্নাংশে ধরা যায়? মূলদ! না গেলে? অমূলদ!
- [করণী ও সরলীকরণ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/06-lesson.html): √ সাইন দেখলে ভয়? আজকে সেই ভয়ের বারোটা বাজাবো!
- [বাস্তব সংখ্যা: অনুশীলন ও ভুল এড়ানো](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/07-lesson.html): বাস্তব সংখ্যায় সবাই যেসব ভুল করে — তুমি করবে না!
- [সেটের ধারণা ও প্রতীক](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/08-lesson.html): গণিতের সবচেয়ে কুল অর্গানাইজার — সেট!
- [সেটের প্রকারভেদ ও উপসেট](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/09-lesson.html): খালি সেট থেকে অসীম সেট — সবার সাথে পরিচয়!
- [সেট অপারেশন ও ভেনচিত্র](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/10-lesson.html): ∪ ∩ − সব অপারেশন ভেনচিত্রে বুঝে ফেলো!
- [ফাংশনের ধারণা](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/11-lesson.html): ইনপুট দাও, আউটপুট নাও — ফাংশন মেশিন!
- [সেট ও ফাংশন: মিশ্র অনুশীলন](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/12-lesson.html): সেট + ফাংশন কম্বো — পরীক্ষায় যেভাবে আসে!
- [বীজগণিতের ভিত্তি পুনরায়](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/13-lesson.html): চলক, ধ্রুবক, রাশি — বীজগণিতের ABC!
- [বর্গসূত্র: (a+b)² ও (a−b)²](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/14-ab-ab.html): বর্গসূত্র — গণিতের সুপারহিরো ফর্মুলা!
- [বর্গসূত্রের প্রয়োগ ও কৌশল](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/15-lesson.html): বর্গসূত্র উল্টো দিক থেকে — পরীক্ষার সিক্রেট ওয়েপন!
- [a² − b² = (a+b)(a−b)](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/16-a-b-abab.html): a²−b² — দেখতে কঠিন, ভাঙতে পানির মতো সহজ!
- [ঘনসূত্র: (a+b)³ ও (a−b)³](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/17-ab-ab.html): ঘনসূত্র — 3D তে সম্প্রসারণ, ভয়ের কিছু নেই!
- [ঘনসূত্রের প্রয়োগ: a³+b³ ও a³−b³](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/18-ab-ab.html): a³+b³ আর a³−b³ — ঘনের যমজ সূত্র!
- [উৎপাদকে বিশ্লেষণ: ধারণা ও কৌশল](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/19-lesson.html): উৎপাদকে বিশ্লেষণ — গণিতের পাজল সলভিং!
- [মধ্যপদ বিশ্লেষণ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/20-lesson.html): মধ্যপদ বিশ্লেষণ — ax²+bx+c ভাঙার আর্ট!
- [সূত্র ব্যবহার করে উৎপাদকে বিশ্লেষণ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/21-lesson.html): বর্গ-ঘন সূত্র দিয়ে ফ্যাক্টরাইজ — সূত্র চিনলেই জিতবে!
- [উৎপাদক উপপাদ্য (Factor Theorem)](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/22-factor-theorem.html): f(a)=0 মানেই (x−a) একটা ফ্যাক্টর — জাদুর মতো!
- [বীজগাণিতিক রাশি: বাস্তব সমস্যা ও পরীক্ষা কৌশল](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/23-lesson.html): শাব্দিক সমস্যা + ভুল এড়ানোর হ্যাক — পরীক্ষা রেডি!
- [সূচকের ধারণা ও মৌলিক নিয়ম](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/24-lesson.html): সূচক — ছোট সংখ্যায় বড় পাওয়ার!
- [শূন্য, ঋণাত্মক ও ভগ্নাংশ সূচক](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/25-lesson.html): a⁰=1 কেন? a⁻ⁿ মানে কী? ভগ্নাংশ সূচকও!
- [লগারিদম কী?](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/26-lesson.html): লগ মানে 'কত ঘাত?' — সূচকের উল্টো গেম!
- [লগারিদমের নিয়ম](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/27-lesson.html): লগের তিন জাদু নিয়ম — গুণকে যোগ বানাও!
- [ম্যান্টিসা ও বৈশিষ্ট্যাংশ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/28-lesson.html): সংখ্যার লগ বের করা — ম্যান্টিসা আর ক্যারেক্টারিস্টিক!
- [সূচক ও লগারিদম: মিশ্র অনুশীলন](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/29-lesson.html): সূচক ↔ লগ — দুই ভাষায় কথা বলো!
- [সমীকরণ কী? ভিত্তি ঝালাই](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/30-lesson.html): সমীকরণ vs অসমীকরণ vs অভেদ — কে কে?
- [প্রথম ঘাতের সমীকরণ সমাধান](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/31-lesson.html): x কে একলা করো — স্টেপ বাই স্টেপ!
- [শাব্দিক সমস্যা থেকে সমীকরণ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/32-lesson.html): বাংলা গল্প → গাণিতিক সমীকরণ — ট্রান্সলেশন আর্ট!
- [দ্বিঘাত সমীকরণের ধারণা](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/33-lesson.html): ax²+bx+c=0 — x² এলে খেলা বদলে যায়!
- [উৎপাদক পদ্ধতিতে দ্বিঘাত সমীকরণ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/34-lesson.html): ফ্যাক্টরাইজ করে x বের করো — ইজি রুট!
- [সূত্র পদ্ধতি ও বিবেচক (Discriminant)](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/35-discriminant.html): শ্রীধরাচার্যের সূত্র — সব দ্বিঘাতের মাস্টার কী!
- [দ্বিঘাত সমীকরণ: বাস্তব সমস্যা](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/36-lesson.html): ক্ষেত্রফল, বয়স, সংখ্যা — দ্বিঘাতে রিয়েল লাইফ!
- [জ্যামিতির ভাষা ও ভিত্তি](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/37-lesson.html): বিন্দু, রেখা, কোণ — জ্যামিতির অ আ ক খ!
- [স্বতঃসিদ্ধ ও উপপাদ্য — পার্থক্য কী?](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/38-lesson.html): কিছু মানতেই হবে, কিছু প্রমাণ করে দেখাতে হবে!
- [রেখা ও কোণের উপপাদ্য](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/39-lesson.html): সমান্তরাল রেখায় ছেদক পড়লে — কোণের মেলা!
- [ত্রিভুজের মৌলিক উপপাদ্য](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/40-lesson.html): ত্রিভুজের কোণ ১৮০° — কেন? প্রমাণ করো!
- [জ্যামিতি প্রমাণ লেখার কৌশল](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/41-lesson.html): প্রমাণ লেখা — জ্যামিতির গল্প বলার আর্ট!
- [ত্রিভুজ অঙ্কন](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/42-lesson.html): কম্পাস-রুলার দিয়ে ত্রিভুজ বানাও — হাতে-কলমে!
- [চতুর্ভুজ অঙ্কন](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/43-lesson.html): চতুর্ভুজ আঁকো — সামান্তরিক থেকে ট্রাপিজিয়াম!
- [বৃত্তের পরিচয় ও মৌলিক ধারণা](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/44-lesson.html): বৃত্ত — গণিতের সবচেয়ে পারফেক্ট আকৃতি!
- [জ্যা ও কেন্দ্র সম্পর্কিত উপপাদ্য](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/45-lesson.html): জ্যা আর কেন্দ্র — লম্ব টানলেই জ্যা অর্ধেক!
- [কেন্দ্রীয় কোণ ও পরিধি কোণ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/46-lesson.html): একই চাপে কেন্দ্রীয় কোণ = ২× পরিধি কোণ!
- [চক্রীয় চতুর্ভুজ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/47-lesson.html): বৃত্তে বসা চতুর্ভুজ — বিপরীত কোণ = ১৮০°!
- [স্পর্শক উপপাদ্য](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/48-lesson.html): স্পর্শক — বৃত্তকে ছুঁয়ে চলে যায়!
- [বৃত্ত সম্পাদ্য ও মিশ্র অনুশীলন](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/49-lesson.html): বৃত্তের সব উপপাদ্য মিশিয়ে — ফাইনাল বস!
- [ত্রিকোণমিতি কী? সমকোণী ত্রিভুজের ভাষা](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/50-lesson.html): সমকোণী ত্রিভুজের তিন বাহু — কে কে?
- [sin, cos, tan — অনুপাত বোঝা ও মনে রাখা](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/51-sin-cos-tan.html): SOH CAH TOA — ছয় অনুপাত মনে রাখার জাদুমন্ত্র!
- [পূরক কোণ ও বিশেষ কোণের মান](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/52-lesson.html): 30°, 45°, 60° — এই তিন কোণের মান মুখস্থ রাখো!
- [ত্রিকোণমিতিক অভেদ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/53-lesson.html): sin²θ + cos²θ = 1 — ত্রিকোণমিতির গোল্ডেন রুল!
- [ত্রিকোণমিতি: মিশ্র সমস্যা ও কৌশল](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/54-lesson.html): ত্রিকোণমিতির 'ফাইনাল বস' — সব মিশিয়ে সরলীকরণ!
- [উন্নতি কোণ ও অবনতি কোণ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/55-lesson.html): উপরে তাকাও → উন্নতি কোণ, নিচে → অবনতি!
- [উচ্চতা ও দূরত্ব: সমস্যা সমাধান](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/56-lesson.html): গাছ, মিনার, ভবন — উচ্চতা বের করো ত্রিকোণমিতি দিয়ে!
- [অনুপাত ও সমানুপাত — ধারণা ও নিয়ম](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/57-lesson.html): a:b = c:d — আড়গুণ করলে সমান!
- [ক্রমিক সমানুপাত](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/58-lesson.html): a:b = b:c — মাঝেরটা দুই জায়গায়!
- [অনুপাত: প্রয়োগমূলক সমস্যা](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/59-lesson.html): ভাগ, মিশ্রণ, শতকরা — অনুপাতের রিয়েল ইউজ!
- [সহসমীকরণ কী?](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/60-lesson.html): দুই সমীকরণ, দুই অজানা — সমাধান একটাই!
- [প্রতিস্থাপন ও নিরসন পদ্ধতি](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/61-lesson.html): প্রতিস্থাপন vs নিরসন — কোনটা কখন, ঝটপট!
- [সহসমীকরণ: বাস্তব সমস্যা](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/62-lesson.html): বয়স, দাম, সংখ্যা — গল্প থেকে সমীকরণ জোড়া!
- [সহসমীকরণের লেখচিত্র](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/63-lesson.html): গ্রাফে দুই লাইন — কোথায় মিলল সেটাই উত্তর!
- [গাণিতিক ধারা (Arithmetic Series)](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/64-arithmetic-series.html): AP — সমান ধাপে এগিয়ে চলো!
- [জ্যামিতিক ধারা (Geometric Series)](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/65-geometric-series.html): GP — সমান হারে গুণ হতে থাকো!
- [ধারা: মিশ্র সমস্যা ও সূত্র বাছাই](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/66-lesson.html): AP না GP? — চেনার কৌশল ও মিশ্র সমস্যা!
- [ত্রিভুজের অনুপাত জ্যামিতি](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/67-lesson.html): সমানুপাতিক বাহু ভাগ — ত্রিভুজের ভিতরে রেখা!
- [ত্রিভুজের সদৃশতা উপপাদ্য](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/68-lesson.html): সদৃশ ত্রিভুজ — আকৃতি একই, সাইজ ভিন্ন!
- [জ্যামিতিক প্রতিসমতা](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/69-lesson.html): আয়নায় দেখো, ঘোরাও — প্রতিসাম্য!
- [ক্ষেত্রফল সম্পর্কিত উপপাদ্য](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/70-lesson.html): সমান বেস + সমান উচ্চতা = সমান ক্ষেত্রফল!
- [ক্ষেত্রফল উপপাদ্যের প্রয়োগ ও সম্পাদ্য](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/71-lesson.html): উপপাদ্য চেনো, চিত্র আঁকো, প্রমাণ করো!
- [ত্রিভুজের ক্ষেত্রফল ও পরিমাপ](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/72-lesson.html): ½×ভূমি×উচ্চতা — ত্রিভুজের ক্ষেত্রফলের ABC!
- [চতুর্ভুজের ক্ষেত্রফল](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/73-lesson.html): আয়তক্ষেত্র থেকে রম্বস — চতুর্ভুজের ক্ষেত্রফল!
- [বৃত্তের ক্ষেত্রফল ও পরিধি](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/74-lesson.html): πr² আর 2πr — বৃত্তের জাদু সংখ্যা π!
- [ত্রিমাত্রিক আকৃতির পরিমিতি](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/75-lesson.html): ঘনক, বেলন, গোলক, শঙ্কু — 3D জগতের পরিমিতি!
- [তথ্য সংগ্রহ ও সারণি](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/76-lesson.html): ডেটা জোগাড় আর টেবিলে সাজাও!
- [কেন্দ্রীয় প্রবণতা: গড়, মধ্যক, প্রচুরক](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/77-lesson.html): গড়, মধ্যক, প্রচুরক — তিন রাজা!
- [পরিসংখ্যান: লেখচিত্র ও মিশ্র সমস্যা](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/class-9-math-bangla/78-lesson.html): বার চার্ট, হিস্টোগ্রাম, পাই — ডেটার ছবি!

## Clothing Business Masterclass

- Course page: https://learn.teamzlab.com/c/clothing-business.html
- Level: Beginner to Advanced
- Lesson count: 30
- About: Free clothing business course: 30 lessons to start, brand, manufacture & scale a clothing line. Quizzes, templates, checklists — no signup.

### Lessons

- [The Clothing Industry Landscape](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/01-the-clothing-industry-landscape.html): Understanding the $1.7 Trillion Fashion World
- [Types of Clothing Businesses](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/02-types-of-clothing-businesses.html): Find Your Perfect Business Model
- [The Entrepreneurial Mindset for Fashion](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/03-the-entrepreneurial-mindset-for-fashion.html): Think Like a Fashion Founder
- [Market Research & Customer Discovery](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/04-market-research-customer-discovery.html): Know Your Customer Before You Sew a Stitch
- [Finding Your Niche & Positioning](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/05-finding-your-niche-positioning.html): Stand Out or Get Lost in the Rack
- [Writing Your Clothing Business Plan](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/06-writing-your-clothing-business-plan.html): Your Blueprint for Success
- [Legal Setup & Intellectual Property](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/07-legal-setup-intellectual-property.html): Protect Yourself and Your Designs
- [Building Your Brand Identity](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/08-building-your-brand-identity.html): More Than Just a Logo
- [Packaging & Presentation](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/09-packaging-presentation.html): The Unboxing Experience
- [Designing Your First Collection](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/10-designing-your-first-collection.html): From Sketch to Tech Pack
- [Fabrics & Materials Sourcing](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/11-fabrics-materials-sourcing.html): The Foundation of Every Garment
- [Pattern Making & Sampling](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/12-pattern-making-sampling.html): Turning Designs into Reality
- [Finding & Working with Manufacturers](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/13-finding-working-with-manufacturers.html): Your Production Partner
- [Production & Quality Control](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/14-production-quality-control.html): From Factory Floor to Your Customer
- [Pricing Strategy & Cost Analysis](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/15-pricing-strategy-cost-analysis.html): Price It Right or Go Broke
- [Financial Management & Cash Flow](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/16-financial-management-cash-flow.html): Follow the Money
- [Inventory Management & Warehousing](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/17-inventory-management-warehousing.html): Too Much Stock Kills, Too Little Loses Sales
- [Setting Up Your Online Store](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/18-setting-up-your-online-store.html): Your 24/7 Global Storefront
- [Product Photography & Visual Content](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/19-product-photography-visual-content.html): A Picture Sells a Thousand Garments
- [E-commerce Optimization & Conversion](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/20-e-commerce-optimization-conversion.html): Turning Browsers into Buyers
- [Social Media Marketing for Fashion](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/21-social-media-marketing-for-fashion.html): Build a Following That Buys
- [Influencer Marketing & Collaborations](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/22-influencer-marketing-collaborations.html): Leverage Other People's Audiences
- [Paid Advertising & Email Marketing](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/23-paid-advertising-email-marketing.html): Scale with Strategy
- [Wholesale & B2B Sales](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/24-wholesale-b2b-sales.html): Selling to Stores and Boutiques
- [Physical Retail & Pop-Up Shops](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/25-physical-retail-pop-up-shops.html): The In-Person Advantage
- [Customer Service & Returns](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/26-customer-service-returns.html): Turn Complaints into Loyalty
- [Supply Chain & Shipping Logistics](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/27-supply-chain-shipping-logistics.html): Get It There Fast and Cheap
- [Sustainability & Ethical Fashion](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/28-sustainability-ethical-fashion.html): Build a Brand That Does Good
- [Scaling Your Clothing Brand](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/29-scaling-your-clothing-brand.html): From Side Hustle to Real Business
- [International Expansion & the Future](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/clothing-business/30-international-expansion-the-future.html): Take Your Brand Global

## Competitive Programming: Zero to Hero

- Course page: https://learn.teamzlab.com/c/cp-kids.html
- Level: Absolute Beginner to Advanced
- Lesson count: 50
- About: The world's easiest free competitive programming course. 50 interactive lessons — learn C++, STL, algorithms, data structures, sorting (bubble, selection, insertion, merge), searching, greedy,…

### Lessons

- [What is Competitive Programming?](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/01-what-is-competitive-programming.html): Discover the world's most exciting brain sport — where coding meets competition!
- [Setting Up Your Coding Playground](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/02-setting-up-your-coding-playground.html): Get your tools ready — let us write and run your very first C++ program!
- [How Online Judges and Contests Work](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/03-how-online-judges-and-contests-work.html): Learn the rules of the game — how to read problems, submit solutions, and get that sweet AC!
- [Variables — Your Code’s Memory Boxes](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/04-variables-your-codes-memory-boxes.html): Learn how your program remembers things — meet the labeled jars of coding!
- [Input and Output — Talking to Your Computer](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/05-input-and-output-talking-to-your-computer.html): Master cin and cout — the walkie-talkies between you and your program!
- [Math Operations — Your Code Calculator](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/06-math-operations-your-code-calculator.html): Learn how to add, subtract, multiply, divide, and find remainders — the building blocks of every CP solution!
- [Data Types Deep Dive — Choosing the Right Box](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/07-data-types-deep-dive-choosing-the-right-box.html): Learn why picking the right data type matters — and how overflow can silently destroy your CP solutions!
- [If-Else — Teaching Your Code to Make Decisions](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/08-if-else-teaching-your-code-to-make-decisions.html): Give your code the power to think! Learn how to make it choose different paths based on conditions.
- [Else-If Chains — Multiple Choices](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/09-else-if-chains-multiple-choices.html): When life gives you more than two options, else-if chains and switch-case have you covered!
- [Logical Operators — Combining Conditions](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/10-logical-operators-combining-conditions.html): Learn to combine conditions with AND, OR, and NOT — the building blocks of powerful decision-making!
- [While Loops — Repeat Until Done](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/11-while-loops-repeat-until-done.html): Keep repeating as long as the condition is true
- [For Loops — The Counter Loop](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/12-for-loops-the-counter-loop.html): A compact loop with init, condition, and update all in one line
- [Nested Loops — Loops Inside Loops](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/13-nested-loops-loops-inside-loops.html): When one loop is not enough, put a loop inside a loop
- [Arrays — A Row of Boxes](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/14-arrays-a-row-of-boxes.html): Learn how to store many values in one variable using arrays — the most important data structure in CP!
- [Array Operations — Working with Your List](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/15-array-operations-working-with-your-list.html): Learn the essential array patterns: sum, average, and counting — skills you will use in every contest!
- [Finding Min, Max, and Searching](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/16-finding-min-max-and-searching.html): Learn to find the smallest, largest, and search for values — three skills every CP contestant needs!
- [Characters and Strings](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/17-characters-and-strings.html): Learn to work with letters and words — unlocking a whole new category of CP problems!
- [String Problems in Contests](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/18-string-problems-in-contests.html): Master the classic string patterns that show up in CP contests again and again!
- [Functions — Your Helper Robots](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/19-functions-your-helper-robots.html): Learn to create reusable blocks of code that make your programs cleaner and your CP solutions faster!
- [Problem Solving with Functions](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/20-problem-solving-with-functions.html): Learn to break big problems into small pieces using functions — the key to solving harder CP problems!
- [GCD and LCM — Number Best Friends](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/21-gcd-and-lcm-number-best-friends.html): Master the greatest common divisor and least common multiple — they show up EVERYWHERE in CP!
- [Playing with Digits](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/22-playing-with-digits.html): Extract, count, sum, and reverse digits — essential tricks for number-based problems!
- [Powers and Modular Arithmetic](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/23-powers-and-modular-arithmetic.html): Handle astronomically huge numbers like a pro
- [Bubble Sort — The Swapping Dance](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/24-bubble-sort-the-swapping-dance.html): The simplest sorting algorithm you will ever learn
- [Binary Search — The Guessing Game](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/25-binary-search-the-guessing-game.html): Find anything in a sorted collection blazingly fast
- [Using sort() and Built-in Tools](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/26-using-sort-and-built-in-tools.html): Let C++ do the heavy sorting for you
- [Frequency Counting — Who Appears Most?](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/27-frequency-counting-who-appears-most.html): Count how often each element appears like a pro
- [Two Pointer Technique](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/28-two-pointer-technique.html): Two markers working together to solve problems fast
- [Prefix Sum — The Running Total](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/29-prefix-sum-the-running-total.html): Answer range sum queries in the blink of an eye
- [Greedy Algorithms — Always Pick the Best](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/30-greedy-algorithms-always-pick-the-best.html): Make the best choice at every step and hope for the best
- [More Greedy Problems](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/31-more-greedy-problems.html): Practice the greedy mindset with classic problems
- [Recursion — The Magic of Self-Calling Functions](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/32-recursion-the-magic-of-self-calling-functions.html): When a function calls itself — and it actually works!
- [More Recursion Adventures](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/33-more-recursion-adventures.html): Fibonacci, powers, and the famous Tower of Hanoi!
- [Stack — The Pancake Pile](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/34-stack-the-pancake-pile.html): Last In, First Out — the data structure that undo buttons love!
- [Queue — The Lunch Line](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/35-queue-the-lunch-line.html): First In, First Out — fair and orderly, just like a real line!
- [Reading Contest Problems Like a Pro](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/36-reading-contest-problems-like-a-pro.html): The most important CP skill that nobody teaches!
- [Solving Easy Contest Problems (A/B Problems)](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/37-solving-easy-contest-problems-ab-problems.html): Your first real contest battles — let's win some problems!
- [Debugging Like a Detective](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/38-debugging-like-a-detective.html): Finding and fixing bugs — the skill that separates good from great!
- [Time Complexity — Making Your Code Fast](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/39-time-complexity-making-your-code-fast.html): Why some solutions pass and others get TLE — the secret is Big O!
- [Your CP Journey — What's Next!](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/40-your-cp-journey-whats-next.html): You've built the foundation — now let's talk about the skyscraper!
- [Dynamic Programming — Remember and Reuse](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/41-dynamic-programming-remember-and-reuse.html): Learn the most powerful problem-solving technique — solve it once, remember it forever!
- [More DP Adventures — Coins and Stairs](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/42-more-dp-adventures-coins-and-stairs.html): Master classic DP problems that appear in contests everywhere — stairs, coins, and more!
- [Graphs — Connecting the Dots](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/43-graphs-connecting-the-dots.html): Explore the data structure that models friendships, maps, networks, and so much more!
- [BFS and DFS — Exploring Graphs Step by Step](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/44-bfs-and-dfs-exploring-graphs-step-by-step.html): Master the two most important ways to explore a graph — level by level or deep into the unknown!
- [Bit Manipulation — The Secret Language of Computers](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/45-bit-manipulation-the-secret-language-of-computers.html): Learn how computers really think — in ones and zeros — and use it to solve problems at lightning speed!
- [Sieve of Eratosthenes — Finding All Primes Fast](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/46-sieve-of-eratosthenes-finding-all-primes-fast.html): Cross out the fakes, keep the real primes!
- [Combinatorics — Counting Without Listing](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/47-combinatorics-counting-without-listing.html): How many ways? Let's count smart, not hard!
- [Practice Makes Champion — Your CP Toolkit](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/48-practice-makes-champion-your-cp-toolkit.html): You've built an arsenal. Now let's master when to use each weapon!
- [More Sorting — Selection, Insertion & Merge Sort](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/49-more-sorting-selection-insertion-merge-sort.html): Master different ways to put things in order and learn when to use each one!
- [C++ STL — Your Super Toolbox](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/cp-kids/50-c-stl-your-super-toolbox.html): Unlock the full power of C++ Standard Template Library for competitive programming!

- Lesson count: 51
- About: Free interactive Flutter & Dart course with 51 hands-on lessons. Learn mobile app development from scratch: Dart programming, widgets, BLoC state management, Clean Architecture, CRUD operations,…

### Lessons

- [What is Programming?](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/flutter-dart-masterclass/01-what-is-programming.html): Teaching Computers to Think
- [Meet Flutter & Dart](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/flutter-dart-masterclass/02-meet-flutter-dart.html): One Code, Beautiful Apps Everywhere
- [Setting Up Flutter](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/flutter-dart-masterclass/03-setting-up-flutter.html): Preparing Your Developer Toolkit

- [Lists & Collections](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/flutter-dart-masterclass/08-lists-collections.html): Organizing Groups of Data
- [Loops & Iteration](https://learn.teamzlab.com/lessons/flutter-dart-masterclass/09-loops-iteration.html): Repeating Actions Like a Pro
